overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a white robe walking through a dimly lit industrial facility or space station interior. The character passes armed guards and computer terminals while approaching a security doorway, with atmospheric haze and artificial lighting throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial security checkpoint with detention cell

events.description: character begins walking forward from stationary position

agents.ego_description: character in white robe walks steadily through the industrial facility past computer terminals

notable_agents.action: armed guard monitoring computer terminal screens

entered.detail: enclosed glass room with metal framing containing a figure inside
desk with multiple glowing blue monitor screens
simple white metal chair near the wall
tall industrial storage lockers against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit industrial security area with artificial lighting and atmospheric haze. A character in a white robe stands facing a glass detention cell in the distance, then begins walking forward past a computer terminal where an armed guard monitors screens. White folding chairs and metal lockers line the left wall.

events.description: passing armed guard standing near the left wall

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk alongside the glass detention cell toward the exit doorway

notable_agents.action: heavily armed guard in tactical gear standing watch

entered.detail: large industrial metal door frame leading to darker corridor
exposed metal pipes and conduits running along the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside the glass detention cell, which is now on the right side, passing a second armed guard on the left. The computer terminal and chairs fall behind as industrial piping becomes visible on the walls. A metal doorway appears in the distance at the end of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: metal doorway threshold to darker corridor

events.description: approaching and entering the metal doorway into the darker corridor beyond

agents.ego_description: approaching the security doorway and entering the darkened corridor

entered.detail: dimly lit passage visible through the doorway ahead

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the metal doorway at the end of the corridor, leaving the glass detention cell and lockers behind. The lighting becomes darker near the threshold as the character enters the doorway, transitioning into the shadowy corridor beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial security corridor that leads into a shadowy interior. It begins in a hazy area where a character in a white robe walks past a computer terminal and an armed guard, with metal lockers and folding chairs lining the periphery. As the character advances, the scene shifts to follow them alongside a glass detention cell while industrial piping emerges on the walls and a second guard passes by. The camera then tracks the character toward a metal doorway at the end of the hall, leaving the detention area behind. Finally, the lighting grows darker as the character crosses the threshold and disappears into the deep shadows of the corridor beyond.
